patches.description: ISS-2022 (H1): Reframe argument (i) scorecard quote as in-panel primary evidence. Removes dependency on WIN-029 cross-reference as the main citation; dome scorecard quote is now the standalone proof that quarter-wave was used quantitatively, not as a heuristic.
patches.find_pattern: , and WIN-029 is the credit claim for that exact inversion. The dome's wins.html scorecard records this in its own words: 'WIN-029 — Schumann Resonance Requires Hard Conductive Ceiling CONFIRMED (H = c/(4×7.83) = 9,572 km, 5.3% from model).' The quarter-wave formula is framed by the dome itself as the equation that produces the confirmation — not as a simplified heuristic to be set aside.
patches.replace_pattern: , and the dome's own wins.html scorecard presents this as a scored confirmation: 'Schumann Resonance Requires Hard Conductive Ceiling CONFIRMED (H = c/(4×7.83) = 9,572 km, 5.3% from model)' (dome entry WIN-029). Quarter-wave is the formula the dome itself used to produce the 5.3% agreement, not a loose heuristic to be abandoned when the argument is inconvenient.

patches.description: ISS-2023 (H2): Add one-sentence TE-mode parenthetical after TM-gap statement in argument (iv). The dome characterised Schumann as TM-type; TE_11 (4.39 Hz) and TE_21 (7.28 Hz) both miss 7.83 Hz, so TE modes do not rescue the claim.
patches.find_pattern: straddles 7.83 Hz on both sides. A curved-top H(r) does perturb this spectrum
patches.replace_pattern: straddles 7.83 Hz on both sides. (TE modes do not rescue the claim: the dome itself characterised Schumann resonance as TM-type analogous to the parallel-plate TM<sub>0,n</sub> mode, and even conceding TE modes, TE<sub>11</sub> at 4.39 Hz and TE<sub>21</sub> at 7.28 Hz are both below or miss 7.83 Hz — neither closes the gap.) A curved-top H(r) does perturb this spectrum

patches.description: ISS-2024 H3: Reduce globe-fingerprint phrasing repetition. Changed third occurrence "globe-fingerprint is imported regardless" to "globe circumference is embedded regardless" to vary phrasing slightly across the three invocations.
patches.find_pattern: the globe-fingerprint is imported regardless of the detailed spectrum
patches.replace_pattern: the globe circumference is embedded regardless of the detailed spectrum

patches.description: ISS-2024 H5+H6: Fix "terminates at an open rim" (dome is closed at rim, not open) and correct 836→837 km rounding. H(r=20015) = 8537×exp(−20015/8619) = 837.1 km, rounds to 837.
patches.find_pattern: down to ≈836 km at the 20,015 km rim) and terminates at an open rim.
patches.replace_pattern: down to ≈837 km at the 20,015 km rim) with no open boundary — H(r) reaches a non-zero minimum at the rim rather than zero.

deferred.description: Collin Field Theory of Guided Waves Ch. 5 citation verification — requires library access check. Deferred to citation-audit EXP per c9 recommendation.
Paragraph-density split of WIN-038 detail_evidence paragraph 4 (~9,600 chars into sub-paragraphs for (i)-(iv)). Substantial restructure — deferred per c7/c8/c9 recommendation.

tldr_evidence: ISS-2022: reframed argument (i) so the dome scorecard quote is the primary in-panel proof (not a supporting note for a cross-WIN link). ISS-2023: added TE-mode parenthetical confirming TE_11/TE_21 also miss 7.83 Hz. ISS-2024 H3/H5/H6: reduced fingerprint-phrasing repetition, corrected "open rim" to closed-boundary phrasing, fixed 836→837 km. EXP-391/392 OBE (ISS-2011/2012 already fixed). H4 (Collin citation) and H7 (paragraph split) deferred.
tldr_verdict: All four applied patches are cosmetic-to-minor: none changes the verdict on WIN-038 (FAIL) or the direction of any argument. They close known defender-exploit angles (heuristic-retreat framing, TE-mode omission, rim-status imprecision, rounding nit). Tests 3616/3616 passed.
